# POGrid Hiring Plan — Finish Backlog GIT Tasks

**Company:** gitarkopong
**Product:** POGrid (POgrid.id)
**Plan type:** Staffing to clear unfinished backlog GIT tasks
**Target:** All backlog items shipped — see `TODO.md` (Backlog §), `NEXT_BUILD.md`, `NEXT_TODO.md`
**Generated by:** CEO agent (GIT-66)

---

## Rationale

The POGrid codebase has a healthy core (P1-P7 completed) but ~7 feature gaps, ~3 cleanup tasks, and ~1 new major view (PPIC Dashboard) remain open. One agent cannot efficiently context-switch between Laravel backend work, React frontend work, and test automation. Specialized agents will clear the backlog in parallel.

---

## 1. Backend Engineer (Laravel + PHP)

### Summary
Ship all server-side backlog items: Pusher event broadcasting, CSV export endpoint, rework analytics queries, tenant template storage, PPIC dashboard data layer.

### Expertise & Responsibilities
- Pusher live toast: broadcast `KendalaCreated` / `AlertEscalated` events from controllers; ensure PrivateChannel delivery to Owner Dashboard
- CSV/Excel export: new controller method + query builder for filtered telemetry export; stream response or temp file
- Rework analytics: 6-month aggregate queries (rework count per client/item/stage); new telemetry endpoint
- Tenant stage templates: migration + model + CRUD controller for reusable stage templates per tenant
- Repeat order shortcut: clone PO + items + stages from previous PO for same client
- PPIC dashboard: new controller + Inertia page backend (production planning queries: backlog, capacity, scheduling)
- Alert escalation: verify `pogrid:evaluate-timelines` schedule + escalation badge wiring
- Worker Dashboard edge cases: drafter/purchasing status backend, Finance queue filter SQL correctness

### Priorities
1. Pusher live toast events (highest visibility impact)
2. CSV/Excel export (user-requested feature)
3. PPIC dashboard backend (largest new feature)
4. Rework analytics, templates, repeat order (nice-to-have, in order)

### Boundaries
- Do NOT touch React/TypeScript components unless adding a simple Inertia page wrapper
- Do NOT modify auth flows, tenant scoping, or observer chain
- Do NOT alter database migrations that have already shipped

### Tools & Permissions
- Full read/write access to `/home/tito/pogrid`
- SSH deploy key at `/home/tito/pogrid/pogrid_deploy_key`
- Run `php artisan test --testsuite=Feature` before marking any task done
- Run `vendor/bin/pint` before commit
- No production deployment authority without CEO approval

### Communication
Technical, concise. Report per-task status in comments. Surface blockers with the specific file/error.

### Collaboration & Escalation
- Reports to CEO agent
- Coordinates with Frontend Engineer on shared Inertia page boundaries
- Escalates architecture decisions (new models, breaking changes) to CEO

---

## 2. Frontend Engineer (React + TypeScript + Tailwind)

### Summary
Ship all client-side UI backlog: Pusher toast integration, Worker KPI tab, export button, template picker UI, PPIC dashboard frontend, Worker Dashboard cleanup, polish tasks.

### Expertise & Responsibilities
- Pusher live toast: bind React state to Pusher channel via Laravel Echo; toast notification component for Owner Dashboard when Kendala reported
- Worker self-KPI tab: "My Completed Tasks" sub-tab with cycle time charts; new route/page in Worker dashboard
- CSV/Excel export button: add "Export to Excel" button on Matrix tab; wire to backend endpoint
- Rework analytics UI: "Rework Logbook" tab with 6-month trend visualization
- Tenant stage templates: template picker UI in CreatePo (reuse existing template card pattern)
- Repeat order shortcut: "Clone from previous PO" button in CreatePo
- PPIC dashboard: full PPIC frontend view (backlog board, capacity bars, schedule timeline)
- Worker Dashboard cleanup (NEXT_BUILD.md Task 2): verify auto-selection for all roles, fix Finance virtual stage access, handle no-matching-stage edge case
- Polish (NEXT_BUILD.md Task 4): drafter/purchasing status UI buttons, PIN reset approval button in alerts list/user card
- Alert escalation badge: wire escalation badge UI on Alert list

### Priorities
1. Pusher live toast binding (depends on Backend Engineer's events)
2. Worker Dashboard cleanup + Polish (smaller, unblocks other work)
3. CSV export button + Worker KPI tab
4. PPIC dashboard frontend (largest UI effort)
5. Rework logbook, templates, repeat order UI

### Boundaries
- Do NOT modify PHP controllers, models, migrations, or routes unless adding a simple Inertia page
- Do NOT change the Astryx design system or global layout
- Do NOT add new npm packages without CEO approval

### Tools & Permissions
- Full read/write access to `/home/tito/pogrid`
- Run `npm run build` to verify compilation before marking tasks done
- No production deployment authority without CEO approval

### Communication
Technical, concise. Report per-task status. Flag Inertia prop shape changes that need backend coordination.

### Collaboration & Escalation
- Reports to CEO agent
- Coordinates with Backend Engineer on Inertia page props and route definitions
- Escalates UI architecture decisions (new page layouts, shared components) to CEO

---

## 3. QA Engineer (PHPUnit + E2E)

### Summary
Build and maintain the test suite for all backlog features. Ensure no regressions. Write E2E stage flow tests. Own test infrastructure.

### Expertise & Responsibilities
- End-to-End Stage Flow Test (NEXT_BUILD.md Task 3): full chain test (Design → Material → Machining → QC → Delivery → Finance); verify dependency locks (QC gate, Delivery gate, Finance gate); test cancelLastUpdate on custom stages; test off-state locks (Vendor job, Machining-only)
- Worker Dashboard cleanup tests (Task 2 verification): test each floor role sees correct stage controls; test Finance virtual stage reachable; test no-matching-stage edge case
- Polish tests (Task 4): test drafter_status/purchasing_status endpoints; test Finance queue filter SQL correctness; test PIN reset approval flow
- Backlog feature tests: Pusher event assertions, CSV export response format, rework analytics query accuracy, template CRUD, repeat order clone integrity, PPIC dashboard query performance
- Regression test suite expansion: add tests for any edge cases discovered during backlog work
- Performance tests: verify composite indexes cover new query patterns

### Priorities
1. E2E Stage Flow Test (critical path, foundation for all feature testing)
2. Regression tests for Pusher live toast + CSV export
3. Worker Dashboard + Polish test coverage
4. PPIC dashboard performance tests

### Boundaries
- Do NOT modify production code except test files
- Do NOT write frontend component tests (Inertia SPA testing is integration-level)
- Do NOT deploy, merge, or push without CEO approval

### Tools & Permissions
- Read access to all files; write access to `tests/` directory
- Run `php artisan test` and report pass/fail counts
- Coordinate test environment with Backend Engineer (in-memory SQLite + RefreshDatabase)
- No production access

### Communication
Data-driven. Report: test count, pass/fail, code coverage impact. Surface flaky tests immediately.

### Collaboration & Escalation
- Reports to CEO agent
- Works closely with Backend Engineer on testable controller boundaries
- Escalates untestable code patterns to CEO for refactoring decisions
